creator: freebsd@04d.co
text:
In a new jail with a slightly modified sample configuration it still does the same. New Asterisk version does not change anything either.

;; pjsip_wizard.conf
[user_defaults](!)
type=wizard
accepts_registrations=yes
sends_registrations=no
accepts_auth=yes
sends_auth=no
endpoint/context=demo
endpoint/allow_subscribe=yes
endpoint/allow=!all,g722,opus,alaw,ulaw
aor/max_contacts=1
aor/remove_existing=yes
aor/remove_unavailable=yes

[1001](user_defaults)
hint_exten=1001
inbound_auth/username=1001
inbound_auth/password=hunter2
aor/mailboxes=1001@default

;; pjsip.conf (uncommented already existing transports)
[transport-udp]
type=transport
protocol=udp    ;udp,tcp,tls,ws,wss,flow
bind=0.0.0.0
[transport-udp-ipv6]
type=transport
protocol=udp
bind=::

The application I am calling is Application_MusicOnHold.
